rulings.Case Title: DELORIS LOGAN VS. HAWK N. LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 1 -1DEFENDANT HAWK LEE's SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Special Motion to Strike is granted, in part, and denied, in part. Motion is granted as to 1-4 causes of action; denied as to 5th cause of action. Plaintiff failed to show probability of prevailing on the merits. See Plaintiff's Declaration and attachments thereto. Defendant's Request for attorney's fees is granted in the amount of $1,650. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DELORIS LOGAN VS. HAWK N. LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT HAWK LEE's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike is Moot. The only remaining causes of action does not seek exemplary damages. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: REGINA A FINULIAR VS. BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP, A SUBSIDIARY OF
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. And BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is continued to October 31, 2012. Plaintiff shall file and serve substantive opposition, if any, no later that October 22, 2012. Defendant shall file and serve its reply, if any, no later that October 26, 2012. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LAUREL TIMMS et al VS. YING Y. WANG AKA THERESA WANG, TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas, Barring Or Limiting Depositions, And Awarding Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 3 - PLAINTIFF LAUREL TIMMS and MATT MCNALLY's Motion For An Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas, Barring Or Limiting Depositions, And Awarding Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion for an Order Quashing Deposition subpoenas is continued to October 17, 2012 to be heard with other pending discovery motions. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: NAVEEN SINGHA VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend Complaint. Defendant's Motion to Dismiss for Failure to Amend is denied, subject to Plaintiff's filing his proposed motions no later than October 16, 2012 noon. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CITIBANK, N.A. AS TRUSTEE VS. JESSIEKA DETRINIDAD et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT JESSIEKA DETRINIDAD's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is denied. Defendant failed to sustain her burden under CCP 473(b) =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. GARY ROSSI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Stay Of Execution Pending Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 8 - DEFENDANT GARY ROSSI, FRANCIS MCDONALD's Motion For Stay Of Execution Pending Appeal. Grant Defendants' Motion for Stay of Execution Pending Appeal, subject to payment of "reasonable rental value" in the amount of $2,750 =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JESAMINE MAK VS. ROMAN MATUREL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 6 - DEFENDANT ROMAN MATUREL's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is granted, subject to opposition. Defendant carried his burden re: excusable neglect. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW PIGMAN VS. FIDEL RAMIREZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October. 16, 2012. Line 7 - DEFENDANT FIDEL RAMIREZ and YOLIDEY DZUL's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendants' Motion to Quash is granted, subject to opposition. =(501/AJR)
